title: SourcesRegistry
description: The global source registry. Every sourceRef in topic frontmatter and quiz files must resolve to an entry here. IDs must be globally unique.

id.description: Stable reference key. Naming convention: {source-type}-{identifier}. Oregon statutes: ors-chapter-{n} or ors-{n}-{section}. Oregon admin rules: oar-{division}-{chapter}. Official docs: {org}-{doc-type}-{keyword}. See docs/content-model.md §Naming Conventions.

title.description: Full title of the source as it should appear in the Sources page.

url.description: Canonical URL. Null when the source is a PDF or document that may move; use description to identify retrieval method.

tier.description: 1 = primary: ORS, OAR, PSI CIB, official CCB pages. 2 = secondary: explanatory references that never override Tier 1. Published topics must have at least one Tier 1 source.

description.description: One sentence describing the source and its authority for this course.

lastCheckedAt.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the URL or document was last confirmed accessible and current.
